articles.title: HomeRun raises $6.6 million in round led by Sorin Investments
articles.description: Titan Capital Winners Fund, Sparrow Capital, Consumer Collective by Atrium, and Helios Holdings participated in the round. Per founder and CEO Pukhraj Grewal, the quick commerce platform for construction and home-improvement materials will use the funds to expand into new cities, add product categories, and invest in fulfilment technology.

articles.title: Mayor apologies after special needs child left with 'no suitable education' for over a year
articles.description: North Tyneside Council has been ordered to pay a family £5,900 after the local authority did not provide specialist technology for a child to learn at home
articles.content:
North Tyneside Council has been ordered to pay a family £5,900 after the local authority did not provide specialist technology for a child to learn at home
North Tyneside’s mayor has apologised to the family of a special needs child who was left with... [1775 chars]

articles.title: Battered IT loses weight on Nifty, banking hits new high
articles.description: Information Technology stocks are losing their grip on the Nifty index. Banks are now more influential, their share in the key index reaching new highs. This shift reflects changing earnings trajectories and investor sentiment. Overseas investors have significantly reduced their exposure to Indian IT. The impact of Artificial Intelligence disruption is a key concern for the sector.
articles.content:

Information Technology stocks are losing their grip on the Nifty index. Banks are now more influential, their share in the key index reaching new highs. This shift reflects changing earnings trajectories and investor sentiment. Overseas inve... [4556 chars]

articles.title: China offers Ukraine aid while accused of enabling Russia war effort
articles.description: China could end Russia's war in Ukraine tomorrow but chooses not to, U.S. Ambassador Matthew Whitaker says, accusing Beijing of enabling the invasion through technology and oil.
articles.content:
China offered new humanitarian energy assistance to Ukraine this week — even as a senior U.S. official said Beijing has the power to stop Russia’s invasion and has chosen not to.
"China could call Vladimir Putin and end this war tomorrow and cut off ... [3563 chars]

articles.title: India, Britain can become world's best places for AI adoption: UK minister
articles.description: LONDON, Feb 16 : The big artificial intelligence laboratories may be found in the US and China, but India and Britain can become the best places in the world for the adoption of AI, UK Minister for AI and Online Safety Kanishka Narayan has said. The Bihar-born Labour MP from Wales, who is in India to attend the AI Impact Summit, which opened in New Delhi on Monday, believes the technology presents huge benefits across the services, healthcare and life […]
articles.content:
LONDON, Feb 16 : The big artificial intelligence laboratories may be found in the US and China, but India and Britain can become the best places in the world for the adoption of AI, UK Minister for AI and Online Safety Kanishka Narayan has said.
The ... [4239 chars]

articles.title: India has highest level of AI skill penetration, adopted policy of avoiding over-regulation: Jitin Prasada
articles.description: NEW DELHI,  Feb 16 : India has the highest level of artificial intelligence (AI) skill penetration and has adopted a policy approach of avoiding over-regulation to ensure innovation thrives, Union Minister Jitin Prasada said on Monday. Speaking at a session in the AI Impact Summit here, the Minister of State for Electronics and Information Technology said the present government is agile and listens to all ideas. The government finetunes its policies, programmes, as per the need of the hour, he […]
articles.content:
NEW DELHI, Feb 16 : India has the highest level of artificial intelligence (AI) skill penetration and has adopted a policy approach of avoiding over-regulation to ensure innovation thrives, Union Minister Jitin Prasada said on Monday.
Speaking at a s... [1359 chars]

articles.title: Tele-Robotics adds new dimension to healthcare with AI value addition: Dr Jitendra
articles.description: Excelsior Correspondent NEW DELHI, Feb 16: Showcasing India’s growing strength in Artificial Intelligence-enabled healthcare and frontier science, Union Minister of State (Independent Charge) for Science & Technology and Earth Sciences, MoS PMO, Personnel, Public Grievances, Pensions, Atomic Energy and Space, Dr. Jitendra Singh, today. The Minister was witnessing the successful live demonstration of an indigenously developed Tele-Robotic Ultrasonography system linking AIIMS, New Delhi with Maitri Research Station in Antarctica. Referring to the ongoing Artificial Intelligence (AI) discussions in the national […]
articles.content:
